meta.title: Prohor Next.js & Supabase Starter Kit
meta.description: Build modern web apps faster with Prohor Next.js Starter Kit. Features Supabase, Tailwind CSS, and Biome linting for an optimal developer experience.
meta.ogDescription: Build modern web apps faster with Prohor Next.js Starter Kit.
meta.twitterTitle: Prohor Next.js Starter Kit - Build Faster Apps Today
meta.twitterDescription: Launch your next web project faster with Prohor Next.js Starter Kit. Featuring Supabase integration, modern Tailwind CSS styling, strict Biome linting, and seamless developer experience built-in.

jsonLd.name: Prohor Next.js Starter Kit
jsonLd.description: A fast, modern, and reliable Next.js starter kit fully equipped with Supabase, Tailwind CSS, and Biome.

faq.question: What is the Prohor Next.js Starter Kit?
faq.answer: Prohor is a modern and fast Next.js starter kit fully equipped with Supabase database, Tailwind CSS styling, Biome linting, and GSAP animation framework.

faq.question: How do I get started with Prohor Starter Kit?
faq.answer: You can start development immediately by cloning the project and running 'bun install' followed by 'bun run dev'.

hero.title: Prohor Next.js Starter Kit
hero.subtitle: A fast, modern, and reliable developer starter kit
